selling_channels_inventory_items_unique_.title: Selling Channels Inventory Items Unique Keys

imported_at.title: Imported At
imported_at.description: The date and time when the order was imported.

display_priority.title: Display Priority
display_priority.description: The priority of the order for UI's to display. Valid 0 - 5.

es_version.title: Es Version
es_version.description: The version of the order in Elasticsearch. Used for optimistic concurrency control.

left.title: Left
left.description: True if the order was left at the merchant fulfillment location

OrderAggregatedStatusOption.title: OrderAggregatedStatusOption
OrderAggregatedStatusOption.description:
Statuses from OrderFulfillmentStatus and OrderShippingStatus

Should be replicated in OrderAggregatedStatusPriority

OrderAggregatedStatusPriority.title: OrderAggregatedStatusPriority
OrderAggregatedStatusPriority.description:
Statuses from OrderAggregatedStatusOption

Should be replicated in OrderAggregatedStatusPriority

OrderFinancialStatus.title: OrderFinancialStatus
OrderFinancialStatus.description:
The financial status of an order.
Once an order is paid we will not change the financial status.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: The date and time when the fulfillment was created.

are_required.title: Are Required
are_required.description: True if the selling channel does not have fulfillment capabilities and the fulfillment is managed through the status of the order.

has_fulfillment_conditions.title: Has Fulfillment Conditions
has_fulfillment_conditions.description: True if the order has fulfillment conditions. For

has_fulfillment_holds.title: Has Fulfillment Holds
has_fulfillment_holds.description: True if the order has fulfillment holds.

OrderFulfillmentConditions.title: OrderFulfillmentConditions
OrderFulfillmentConditions.description: True if the fulfillment modules is active.

price.title: Price
price.description: The price of the item before discounts have been applied in the shop currency.

quantity.title: Quantity
quantity.description: The number of items that were purchased.

reserved_quantity.title: Reserved Quantity
reserved_quantity.description: The number of items that are reserved at the moment of selling.

missing_quantity.title: Missing Quantity
missing_quantity.description: The number of items that are missing.

label_creation_excepted_city.title: Label Creation Excepted City
label_creation_excepted_city.description: The label will not be created for this order because of the selling channel policy regarding the excepted cities.

subtotal_price.title: Subtotal Price
subtotal_price.description: The total discounts applied to the price of the order in the shop currency.

total_discounts.title: Total Discounts
total_discounts.description: The total discounts applied to the price of the order in the shop currency.

total_price.title: Total Price
total_price.description: The sum of all line item prices, discounts, shipping, taxes, and tips in the shop currency. Must be positive.

total_tax.title: Total Tax
total_tax.description: The sum of all the taxes applied to the order in the shop currency. Must be positive.

total_tip_received.title: Total Tip Received
total_tip_received.description: The sum of all the tips in the order in the shop currency.

imported_at.title: Imported At
imported_at.description: The date and time when the order was imported.

address1.title: Address1
address1.description: The street address of the shipping address.

address2.title: Address2
address2.description: An optional additional field for the street address of the shipping address.

city.title: City
city.description: The city, town, or village of the shipping address.

company.title: Company
company.description: The company of the person associated with the shipping address.

country.title: Country
country.description: The name of the country of the shipping address.

country_code.title: Country Code
country_code.description: The two-letter code (ISO 3166-1 format) for the country of the shipping address.

first_name.title: First Name
first_name.description: The first name of the person associated with the shipping address.

last_name.title: Last Name
last_name.description: The last name of the person associated with the shipping address.

name.title: Name
name.description: The full name of the person associated with the payment method.

phone.title: Phone
phone.description: The phone number at the shipping address.

province.title: Province
province.description: The name of the region (for example, province, state, or prefecture) of the shipping address.

province_code.title: Province Code
province_code.description: The two-letter abbreviation of the region of the shipping address.

zip.title: Zip
zip.description: The postal code (for example, zip, postcode, or Eircode) of the shipping address.

are_required.title: Are Required
are_required.description: True if the selling channel does not have fulfillment capabilities and the fulfillment is managed through the status of the order.

has_shipping_conditions.title: Has Shipping Conditions
has_shipping_conditions.description: True if the order has shipping generation conditions. For

has_shipping_holds.title: Has Shipping Holds
has_shipping_holds.description: True if the order has holds.

OrderShippingConditions.title: OrderShippingConditions
OrderShippingConditions.description: True if the shipping modules is active.

external_identifier.title: External Identifier
external_identifier.description: The ID of the order from the selling channel. This ID is unique to the selling channel and must be kept constant for the life of the order. Example: SQL order ID, Shopify order ID, etc.

billing_address.description: The mailing address associated with the payment method. This address is an optional field that won't be available on orders that do not require a payment method. It has the following properties:

cancel_reason.title: Cancel Reason
cancel_reason.description: The reason why the order was canceled. Valid values:

cancelled_at.title: Cancelled At
cancelled_at.description: The date and time when the order was canceled. Returns null if the order isn't canceled. DATE_FORMAT

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: The autogenerated date and time (ISO 8601 format) when the order was created in the selling channel. The value for this property cannot be changed.

currency.description: The three-letter code (ISO 4217 format) for the shop currency.

current_total_price.title: Current Total Price
current_total_price.description: The current total additional fees on the order in shop and presentment currencies. The amount values associated with this field reflect order edits, returns, and refunds.

financial_status.description: The status of payments associated with the order. Can only be set when the order is created. Valid values:

fulfillments.title: Fulfillments
fulfillments.description: A fulfillment order represents a group of one or more items in an order that will be fulfilled from the same location. A fulfillment represents work that is completed as part of a fulfillment order and can include one or more items. You can use the Fulfillment resource to manage fulfillments for fulfillment orders. Each object has the following properties:

fulfillment_status.description: The order's status in terms of fulfilled line items. You can use the FulfillmentOrder resource for a more granular view. Valid values:

line_items.title: Line Items
line_items.description: A list of line item objects, each containing information about an item in the order. Each object has the following properties:

name.title: Name
name.description: The order name, generated by combining the order_number property with the order prefix and suffix that are set in the merchant's general settings. This is different from the external_identifier property, which is the ID of the order used by the API. This field can also be set by the API to be any string value.

payment_terms.description: The terms and conditions under which a payment should be processed.

payment_gateway_names.title: Payment Gateway Names
payment_gateway_names.description: The list of payment gateways used for the order.

reference.title: Reference
reference.description: The order name, generated by combining the order_number property with the order prefix and suffix that are set in the merchant's general settings. This is different from the external_identifier property, which is the ID of the order used by the API. This field can also be set by the API to be any string value.

shipping_address.description: The mailing address to where the order will be shipped. This address is optional and will not be available on orders that do not require shipping. It has the following properties:

total_price.title: Total Price
total_price.description: The sum of all line item prices, discounts, shipping, taxes, and tips in the shop currency. Must be positive.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: The date and time when the fulfillment was created. The API returns this value in ISO 8601 format.

line_items.title: Line Items
line_items.description: A list of the fulfillment's line items, which includes:

name.title: Name
name.description: The uniquely identifying fulfillment name, consisting of two parts separated by a .. The first part represents the order name and the second part represents the fulfillment number. The fulfillment number automatically increments depending on how many fulfillments are in an order (e.g. #1001.1, #1001.2).

origin_address.description: The address of the fulfillment location.

status.description: The status of the fulfillment. Valid values:

tracking_company.title: Tracking Company
tracking_company.description: The name of the tracking company with which the fulfillment is associated. This value is used to determine the tracking URL for the fulfillment. If the tracking company is not recognized, the tracking URL will not be generated. If you cannot find the possible value below, send it as a string and we will be notified. Possible values below:

tracking_numbers.title: Tracking Numbers
tracking_numbers.description: A list of tracking numbers provided by the shipping company.

tracking_urls.title: Tracking Urls
tracking_urls.description: A list of tracking URLs provided by the shipping company.

updated_at.title: Updated At
updated_at.description: The date and time (ISO 8601 format) when the fulfillment was last modified..

address1.title: Address1
address1.description: The street address of the shipping address.

address2.title: Address2
address2.description: An optional additional field for the street address of the shipping address.

city.title: City
city.description: The city, town, or village of the shipping address.

country_code.title: Country Code
country_code.description: The two-letter code (ISO 3166-1 format) for the country of the shipping address.

province_code.title: Province Code
province_code.description: The two-letter abbreviation of the region of the shipping address.

zip.title: Zip
zip.description: The postal code (for example, zip, postcode, or Eircode) of the shipping address.

id.title: Id
id.description: The ID of the line item. Must be unique and kept constant for the life of the line item. If the line item is removed from the order then the quantity must be set to 0

product_variant_external_identifier.title: Product Variant External Identifier
product_variant_external_identifier.description: The ID of the product variant being fulfilled.

quantity.title: Quantity
quantity.description: The number of items in the fulfillment.

price.title: Price
price.description: The price of the item before discounts have been applied in the shop currency.

fulfillable_quantity.title: Fulfillable Quantity
fulfillable_quantity.description: The amount available to fulfill, calculated as follows: quantity - max(refunded_quantity, fulfilled_quantity) - pending_fulfilled_quantity - open_fulfilled_quantity

id.title: Id
id.description: The ID of the line item. Must be unique and kept constant for the life of the line item. If the line item is removed from the order then the quantity must be se to 0

product_external_identifier.title: Product External Identifier
product_external_identifier.description: The external_identifier of the product that must be shipped. Can be null if the product was deleted. Usually an SQL ID, but can be any string that uniquely identifies the product variant in the merchant's system.

quantity.title: Quantity
quantity.description: The number of items that were purchased.

product_variant_external_identifier.title: Product Variant External Identifier
product_variant_external_identifier.description: The external_identifier of the product that must be shipped. Can be null if the product was deleted. Usually an SQL ID, but can be any string that uniquely identifies the product variant in the merchant's system.

address1.title: Address1
address1.description: The street address of the shipping address.

address2.title: Address2
address2.description: An optional additional field for the street address of the shipping address.

city.title: City
city.description: The city, town, or village of the shipping address.

company.title: Company
company.description: The company of the person associated with the shipping address.

country.title: Country
country.description: The name of the country of the shipping address.

country_code.title: Country Code
country_code.description: The two-letter code (ISO 3166-1 format) for the country of the shipping address.

first_name.title: First Name
first_name.description: The first name of the person associated with the shipping address.

last_name.title: Last Name
last_name.description: The last name of the person associated with the shipping address.

latitude.title: Latitude
latitude.description: The latitude of the shipping address.

longitude.title: Longitude
longitude.description: The longitude of the shipping address.

name.title: Name
name.description: The full name of the person associated with the payment method.

phone.title: Phone
phone.description: The phone number at the shipping address.

province.title: Province
province.description: The name of the region (for example, province, state, or prefecture) of the shipping address.

province_code.title: Province Code
province_code.description: The two-letter abbreviation of the region of the shipping address.

zip.title: Zip
zip.description: The postal code (for example, zip, postcode, or Eircode) of the shipping address.

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: The amount that is owed according to the payment terms.

currency.description: The presentment currency for the payment. Possible values:

payment_terms_name.title: Payment Terms Name
payment_terms_name.description: The name of the selected payment terms template for the order.

payment_terms_type.title: Payment Terms Type
payment_terms_type.description: The type of selected payment terms template for the order.

due_in_days.title: Due In Days
due_in_days.description: The number of days between the invoice date and due date that is defined in the selected payment terms template.

payment_schedules.title: Payment Schedules
payment_schedules.description: An array of schedules associated to the payment terms.

issued_at.title: Issued At
issued_at.description: The date and time when the payment terms were initiated.

due_at.title: Due At
due_at.description: The date and time when the payment is due. Calculated based on issued_at and due_in_days or a customized fixed date if the type is fixed.

completed_at.title: Completed At
completed_at.description: The date and time when the purchase is completed. Returns null initially and updates when the payment is captured.

pickup_date.title: Pickup Date
pickup_date.description: The date the courier should pick up the package. It should be in the following format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS

display_priority_0.title: Display Priority 0
display_priority_0.description: The date and time when the order should be placed in the late status. Date is UTC, Zulu format.

display_priority_1.title: Display Priority 1
display_priority_1.description: The date and time when the order should be placed in the late status. Date is UTC, Zulu format.

display_priority_2.title: Display Priority 2
display_priority_2.description: The date and time when the order should be placed in the late status. Date is UTC, Zulu format.

display_priority_3.title: Display Priority 3
display_priority_3.description: The date and time when the order should be placed in the late status. Date is UTC, Zulu format.

display_priority_4.title: Display Priority 4
display_priority_4.description: The date and time when the order should be placed in the late status. Date is UTC, Zulu format.

display_priority_5.title: Display Priority 5
display_priority_5.description: The date and time when the order should be placed in the late status. Date is UTC, Zulu format.

ShipmentIdentifier.title: ShipmentIdentifier
ShipmentIdentifier.description:
Shipment identifiers.
Example: If you have 3 fields for identification (order id, order reference and phone number) you will need to add the following entries:
    - "phone_number": str
    - "email_address": str
    - "order_id": str
